creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Max said that if QT4 option enable will causing circular dependency. Close 
this PR until you find the solution. If you want my honest opinion. I think 
it's silly for cairo to depend on any of GUI toolkit. It is supposed to be 
in other way for example QT4 depend on cairo makes a lot sense than cairo 
-> QT4.
